label: Artisan Market
description: Handmade, craft-fair and Etsy-adjacent expression for makers, small ceramic studios, woodworking shops, candle brands, soap-makers and other one-person-with-a-workbench operations. Cream paper background, deep olive primary and a brick-red accent feel like a Sunday market in a converted warehouse. Slightly serif display face gives the unique-each-item feel; subtle motion respects that the product itself is the spectacle.
